title: Autumn Term Tuition Fees — Hamid Al-Rashidi at Kensington Islamic Grammar School
story: My son Hamid is enrolled at Kensington Islamic Grammar School in London, studying for his GCSEs. We lost my wife's income earlier this year following a prolonged illness, and the autumn term fees of £2,850 are due by 15 August 2026. Hamid has consistently maintained strong academic results and we are determined not to disrupt his education. Any support towards his tuition will be deeply appreciated and will allow him to complete the academic year without interruption.
